name: Buttermilk Fudge Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar and unsweetened cocoa; add milk and heat.
2. Stir until the sugar dissolves. Cool the mixture.
3. Beat smooth buttermilk and vanilla in a separate bowl.
4. Combine the chocolate milk with the cooled mixture. Chill and stir freeze.
Note: This recipe is for a 1-quart machine. Double or triple ingredients if needed for your machine.
